positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial mountain range landscape. The composition should be centered, featuring sharp, clean silhouettes of jagged peaks against a gradient sky. Foreground details include constellations rendered as glowing, abstract lines and simple geometric planets. The color palette is deep indigo, cosmic teal, matte gold, and soft lavender. Use negative space effectively. Graphic style combining Art Deco geometry with modern bioluminescence. Perfect for a t-shirt print, vector quality, high contrast, strong depth perception, highly detailed etching style.
negative: blur, fuzzy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, poorly drawn, asymmetrical, messy, excessive detail, photorealism, dirty, messy, muted color, jpeg artifacts
